title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API, published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama API, installable via PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (PyPI: langchain-ollama) providing Ollama LLM and embeddings wrappers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model, packaged as a Docker image.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android support, available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for quick model pulls and prompts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like pair programmer.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-curated recipes for deploying, fine-tuning, and integrating Ollama in production.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem (ollama) for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) maintained by the Ollama team.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any local Ollama model.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to run and chat with Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration that injects an Ollama4j client for Java apps.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Unofficial Dart/Flutter package (pub.dev: ollama) for talking to Ollama servers.

title: ollama-ts
summary: Lightweight TypeScript client (npm: ollama-ts) with ESM and CommonJS builds.
